title: phylloma macrum
intro: Phylloma macrum, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial effects. The health benefits of Phylloma macrum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and lowering blood pressure, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as diabetes and Alzheimer's disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and modern supplements.
